vocab.meaning: người đọc ngấu nghiến, người mọt sách
vocab.example: Ever since I was a toddler, I’ve been a voracious reader, often finishing a novel in a single sitting.

vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm gián tiếp (qua lời kể/sách vở)
vocab.example: Reading travelogues provides a vicarious experience of exploring remote corners of the globe without leaving my armchair.
I find non-fiction works on philosophy to be incredibly intellectually stimulating, as they challenge my preconceived notions.

vocab.meaning: thoát khỏi sự tầm thường/nhàm chán của cuộc sống thường nhật
vocab.example: For me, diving into a fantasy epic is the perfect way to escape the mundane and immerse myself in extraordinary worlds.

vocab.meaning: những hiểu biết sâu sắc về
vocab.example: Classical literature often offers profound insights into human nature and the complexities of our emotions.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng quan điểm/góc nhìn của ai đó
vocab.example: Exposing myself to diverse genres helps to broaden my perspective on global issues and cultural differences.
I believe that everyone should experience a literary masterpiece like 'One Hundred Years of Solitude' at least once.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng vốn từ vựng của ai đó
vocab.example: Reading high-brow magazines is an effective way to expand one's vocabulary and improve command of the language.

vocab.meaning: mải mê, chìm đắm vào cái gì
vocab.example: I was so engrossed in the detective thriller that I completely lost track of time and stayed up until dawn.

vocab.meaning: một hoạt động mang tính cá nhân/độc lập
vocab.example: While many enjoy book clubs, I prefer reading as a solitary pursuit, allowing me to reflect deeply on the text in peace.
